texto: To write a novel is to dream a story and write it down on the page. That’s why the power of a really good story is one of true magic. Good stories engage the reader utterly in the writer’s dream so the dream becomes theirs, too.
explicacao: Citação de Wendy J. Dunn sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “To write a novel is to dream a story and write it down on the page. That’s why the power of a rea…” articula motivacao, writing-process, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
